name: Albany YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Albany YMCA in Corvallis, OR!

name: Chintimini Park/Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Chintimini Park/Community Center in Corvallis, OR! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: G3 Sports & Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at G3 Sports & Fitness in Corvallis, OR! There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Jim Ringler (Adams) Pickleball courts
description: Jim Ringler (Adams) Pickleball courts is a place to play pickleball in Corvallis, OR. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Timberhill Athletic Club
description: Timberhill Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Corvallis, OR. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.
